text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is over. The time we spent there
wasn't without merit, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm left feeling a little forlorn. A certain
Umamusume who was always there with us barely
showed her face at all.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon, um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nonetheless, we decide to touch on our summer
camp experiences with Agnes Tachyon.
Specifically those concerning Manhattan Cafe's
friend.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I see... Well, whether it's witches or
something else entirely...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Who really knows what good and evil are in the
first place? I'm of the opinion that such notions
don't exist outside our realm of existence.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Good and evil... don't exist? My friend is neither?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yes, it all boils down to direction.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Where do you want to go? Who do you want to
take with you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Is good to the north and evil to the south? Or is it
a matter of above and below? And from which
angle are the two determined?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Good and evil do not exist, and even if they did,
it wouldn't matter. Whatever the intentions,
regardless of the course taken...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If the results are good, you have your answer.
Well, as long as your desired destination aligns
with where your friend's heading.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon's expression turns suddenly stern.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And your destination is decidedly different from
my own.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This summer, I came to understand something...
and I came to a decision.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Cafe, Trainer. This is farewell. And probably for
good.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's dissolve our relationship. I won't involve
myself with either of you anymore.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Now don't make that face. This had to be done. We always were different, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was young. It took trying this out to realize.
Well, I'd probably still disappear from your lives
whether I realized or not.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: The two of you and I... We're on different paths.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon turns to leave without showing a
hint of sorrow.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: See you around... someday...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Farewell for good. That's what she said, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Manhattan Cafe, Agnes Tachyon coolly
raises her hand.
